description.en:
Attacks an enemy, and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Marked</color> on the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
When the caster is granted <color=#28d9ed>Radiant Will</color>, changes to <color=#ffd732>Help Me, Master!</color>.

<color=#ffd732>Help Me, Master!</color>
Attacks an enemy and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. Increases damage dealt.
description.kr:
적을 공격하고, 자신에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>표식</color>을 부여합니다.
<color=#28d9ed>찬란한 의지</color> 보유 시에는 <color=#ffd732>도와줘요, 스승님!</color>으로 변경됩니다.

<color=#ffd732>도와줘요, 스승님!</color>
적을 공격하고, 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>합니다. 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp:
敵単体にダメージを与え、自分に<color=#28d9ed>標的</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
自分に<color=#28d9ed>【燦然たる意志】</color>が付与されている場合、このスキルが<color=#ffd732>【助けて、師匠!】</color>に変更される。

<color=#ffd732>【助けて、師匠!】</color>
敵単体にダメージを与え、対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。ダメージがUPする。
description.zh:
攻击敌人,并使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>标记</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
附带<color=#28d9ed>璀璨之志</color>时,变更为<color=#ffd732>师父帮我!</color>。

<color=#ffd732>师父帮我!</color>
攻击敌人,对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。伤害提升。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAll enemies take increased damage proportional to the number of debuffs they are affected by.\nAfter being attacked, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance of <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turns on each enemy.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n적 전체는 보유한 약화 효과에 비례하여 받는 피해가 증가합니다.\n피격 후 적 전체에게 각각 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n敵全体は保有する弱体効果数に比例して被ダメが増加する。\n被弾後、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>ターンの間付与する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n敌方全体所受伤害随减益效果数量提高。\n被攻击后,对敌方全体分别以<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率附加<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合。

description.en: Gains <color=#28d9ed>Radiant Will</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, then attacks all enemies. After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nRight after using this skill, does not trigger an enemy's Counterattack, Revenge, or Agile Response.
description.kr: <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>찬란한 의지</color>를 획득한 후 적 전체를 공격합니다. 공격 후 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.\n이 스킬 직후에는 적의 반격, 복수, 신속 대응이 발동하지 않습니다.
description.jp: <color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間、<color=#28d9ed>【燦然たる意志】</color>を獲得した後、敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を付与する。\nこのスキルでは敵の反撃、復讐、迅速対応が発動しない。
description.zh: 获得<color=#28d9ed>璀璨之志</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,随后攻击全体敌人。攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n该技能结束后,不会触发敌人的反击、复仇、迅速应对。
